title: Power Loom for Weaving Fabric
abstract: A power loom apparatus for weaving fabric comprising a frame assembly, warp beam for supplying warp threads, a cloth beam for collecting woven fabric, reciprocating heddle frames for creating a shed, a shuttle mechanism for inserting weft threads, and a beater assembly for packing the weft. The loom includes treadle-operated mechanisms and cam-driven motion systems for synchronized operation.
description: The present invention relates to power looms for weaving textile fabrics. The loom comprises a rigid frame structure supporting all mechanical components. Warp threads are supplied from a warp beam mounted at the rear of the frame and pass through heddles mounted in heddle frames. The heddle frames move vertically in alternating sequence to create a shed through which the shuttle passes carrying the weft thread. After each shuttle pass, the beater swings forward to pack the newly inserted weft thread against the fell of the cloth. The woven fabric is wound onto the cloth beam at the front of the loom. Treadles connected via linkages to the heddle frames allow the operator to control the shedding motion. The entire mechanism is driven by an electric motor through a system of gears, cams, and connecting rods.

components.name: Main Frame
components.description: Primary structural frame supporting all loom components

components.name: Side Frame (Left)
components.description: Left vertical side plate of main frame

components.name: Side Frame (Right)
components.description: Right vertical side plate of main frame

components.name: Cross Beam (Top)
components.description: Horizontal beams connecting side frames at top

components.name: Cross Beam (Bottom)
components.description: Horizontal beams connecting side frames at base

components.name: Warp Beam
components.description: Rear beam holding supply of warp threads, rotates to release thread

components.name: Cloth Beam
components.description: Front beam that winds and collects the woven fabric

components.name: Warp Beam Shaft
components.description: Central shaft running through warp beam

components.name: Cloth Beam Shaft
components.description: Central shaft running through cloth beam

components.name: Heddle Frame Assembly
components.description: Rectangular frames holding heddles, moves up/down to create shed

components.name: Heddle
components.description: Wire loops with central eye through which warp threads pass

components.name: Heddle Frame Guide Rod
components.description: Vertical guide rods for heddle frame movement

components.name: Shuttle
components.description: Boat-shaped carrier for weft thread bobbin, passes through shed

components.name: Shuttle Bobbin
components.description: Spool holding weft thread, sits inside shuttle

components.name: Shuttle Race
components.description: Track along which shuttle travels

components.name: Beater/Sley Assembly
components.description: Swinging frame that holds the reed and packs weft threads

components.name: Reed
components.description: Comb-like component with fine teeth that spaces warp threads and beats weft

components.name: Beater Pivot Shaft
components.description: Horizontal shaft on which beater assembly pivots

components.name: Treadle
components.description: Foot-operated pedals connected to heddle frames

components.name: Treadle Pivot Rod
components.description: Horizontal rod on which treadles pivot

components.name: Lam
components.description: Horizontal connecting bars between treadles and heddle frames

components.name: Cam
components.description: Eccentric cams driving heddle frame motion

components.name: Cam Shaft
components.description: Shaft carrying the shedding cams

components.name: Drive Gear
components.description: Main drive gears for power transmission

components.name: Pinion Gear
components.description: Smaller gears meshing with drive gears

components.name: Bearing
components.description: Ball bearings supporting rotating shafts

components.name: Electric Motor
components.description: Main drive motor, 2HP, 1750 RPM

components.name: Drive Belt
components.description: V-belt connecting motor to main drive pulley

motion_sequences.name: Shedding
motion_sequences.description: Heddle frames move up/down alternately to separate warp threads

motion_sequences.name: Picking
motion_sequences.description: Shuttle passes through the shed carrying weft thread

motion_sequences.name: Beating
motion_sequences.description: Beater swings forward to pack weft against cloth fell

motion_sequences.name: Takeup
motion_sequences.description: Cloth beam rotates incrementally to wind woven fabric

motion_sequences.name: Letoff
motion_sequences.description: Warp beam releases thread as weaving progresses

summary: Power loom with 28 components across 8 assembly groups. Features 5 synchronized motion sequences for continuous fabric weaving. Primary materials: cast iron frame, steel shafts/gears, hardwood beams and shuttle.
